events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario involves pressure testing with an expired gauge calibration. ASME B31.3 §345 covers pressure testing requirements. An expired gauge calibration means the test instrument is not calibrated, which invalidates the pressure test results. The gauge is non-compliant/defective. The test cannot be accepted.

    "Pressure test performed with a gauge whose calibration has expired, invalidating recorded test results",
    "Test instrument does not meet ASME B31.3 §345 requirements for calibrated/verified measuring devices"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove expired gauge from service and replace with a current-calibrated, suitable-range pressure gauge",
    "Repeat the pressure test using verified/calibrated instrumentation",
    "Document calibration certificates for all test instruments prior to retest"
  ],
  "rationale": "ASME B31.3 §345 requires pressure tests to be performed with suitable, calibrated instrumentation. An expired gauge calibration means the test readings cannot be trusted, so the pressure test is non-compliant and must be repeated with a valid calibrated gauge.",
